body.title: Fable window: adversarial hollow-artifact attack on every filing/close gate
body.description:
intention: I intend that every gate is proven against the artifact that passes it while violating its intent, and every hole becomes a named missing-spec ticket.

Proof-on-close applied to the process: for each gate (audit-ticket, audit-design, audit-hypothesis, audit-precode, audit-smell, proof-on-close, consequence gate), construct the artifact that PASSES the gate while violating its intent (hollow ticket, vague-but-well-formed decision, confabulated proof). Every successful pass-through is a missing spec — file a ticket per hole naming the gap and the tightening. Simulation-only: attack artifacts are clearly marked and never filed into the live queue/store (scratch dir or tmp store; on-paper evaluation against gate checklists).

**Affected files:** devlab/runtime/memory/notes/gate-attack-report.<date>.md + tickets per hole

**Design rules:** attacks never touch the live queue — tmp store or on-paper evaluation only

**Scope boundary:** attack + report + filed findings; NO gate fixes in this ticket (each hole is its own ticket). If holes exceed ~20, roll up grouped by gate.

**Test plan:** no code tests — analysis ticket; close shipped-unproven naming the lever. Cleanup: any tmp-store attack artifacts deleted; report notes the scratch path used.

**Completion criteria:** report exists in notes/ with one section per gate attacked; every hole line carries a filed T- id — grep finds zero naked holes; zero attack artifacts in the live store (grep for the attack marker).

**Validation:** grep checks over the report + live store.

audit-emphasis: doc-only

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Attack report notes/gate-attack-report.20260707.md: 8 gates attacked, all sections ticketed or verdicted. Systemic pair: audits are self-attested (T-audit-run-records-enforced) + author-as-judge (T-filing-audits-independent-examiner, gated on the first). Local: T-discriminating-signal-check, T-unproven-lever-hygiene (cc_queue.py:1019 verified — any non-empty string closes), T-audit-smell-evasion-guards (sub-threshold slicing + self-declared skip), T-consequence-ticket-aging-alarm (June consequence tickets sitting overdue). Live evidence used from today's session: Scraps form-only red->green, warn-only intention teeth, self-audited /sorted batch. No attack artifacts touched the live store.
body.intention: I intend that every gate is proven against the artifact that passes it while violating its intent, and every hole becomes a named missing-spec ticket.
body.unproven_reason: attack constructions are on-paper; candidate lever: a gate-attack regression harness that replays each construction against the amended gates (named as attack-regression in T-discriminating-signal-check / T-audit-smell-evasion-guards test plans)
